title: Fossils And Archeology: Dominion
description: This Resource pack aims to bring the Dinosaurs from Jurassic World: Dominion into the Fossils and Archeology: Revival Genesis mod.
body:
========================================================================

This Resource pack aims to bring the Dinosaurs from Jurassic World: Dominion into the Fossils and Archeology: Revival Genesis mod.

If you use this texture in a youtube video, id love for you to leave the link for it in the description :)

_The roaster:_

- Therizinosaurus
- Quetzalcoatlus
- Allosaurus
- Parasaurolophus
  
_Future Content:_

- Pyroraptor (Deinonychus Skin)
- Dreadnoughtus (Diplodocus Skin?)
- Pteranodon
- Dimophodon
=======================================================================

All rights to Universal Studios and The F/A dev team.
